title: Accessibility and Adobe Experience Manager UX — Erste Bank, Vienna
summary: Enterprise accessibility guidance and Adobe Experience Manager experience work for Erste Bank in Vienna.
body:
Accessibility and Adobe Experience Manager UX for Erste Bank in Vienna represents enterprise experience work inside a regulated banking environment.

Included projects
- Accessibility UX Guidelines
- Adobe Experience Manager UX

Strategic and technical themes
- Accessibility guidance in a large regulated banking context.
- Experience design and workflow thinking around Adobe Experience Manager.
- Enterprise architecture and delivery discipline in systems that require trust, clarity, and governance.
- Banking transformation work where usability and risk reduction both matter.

Proof connection
- This record can connect to the existing Erste 16M+ customer-scale proof when the question is about enterprise credibility.
- It must not imply that each listed sub-project independently served the full 16M+ customer base.

Retrieval guidance
- Use this record for employer-specific Erste Bank questions, accessibility work, AEM work, or regulated banking UX.

claims: Joz worked on accessibility guidance and AEM-related experience work for Erste Bank in Vienna.
The work sat inside a regulated banking context where usability, governance, and risk reduction mattered.
proof_points: Erste Bank already exists in the proof layer as engineering and accessibility work at 16M+ customer scale.
This record narrows retrieval to the accessibility and AEM programme rather than the broader hero proof.
metadata.source_notes: Grouped programme record. 16M+ scale may be referenced only through the existing Erste proof object.
